name: red-alert-whatsapp
description: Israeli Red Alert (Pikud HaOref) to WhatsApp group bot

scripts.start: npx pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs && npx pm2 logs red-alert-whatsapp
scripts.setup:logs: npx pm2 install pm2-logrotate && npx pm2 set pm2-logrotate:max_size 50M && npx pm2 set pm2-logrotate:retain 3 && npx pm2 set pm2-logrotate:compress true
